Interface InsertBuilder

public interface InsertBuilder
Entry point to construct an Insert statement.
Since:
1.1
Author:
Mark Paluch, Jens Schauder

  • Method Details

    • into

      InsertBuilder.InsertIntoColumnsAndValuesWithBuild into(Table table)
      Declare a Table to INSERT INTO.
      Parameters:
      table - the table to INSERT INTO must not be null.
      Returns:
      this builder.
